</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">else</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Calendar</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">class</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">isAssignableFrom</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cl</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">serializer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">CalendarSerializer</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">create</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">else</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Locale</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">class</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">isAssignableFrom</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cl</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">serializer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">LocaleSerializer</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">create</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">else</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Enum</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">class</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">isAssignableFrom</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cl</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">serializer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">new</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">EnumSerializer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cl</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">serializer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">==</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">serializer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">getDefaultSerializer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cl</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_cachedSerializerMap</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">==</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">_cachedSerializerMap</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">new</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">HashMap</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">8</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="kd">synchronized</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_cachedSerializerMap</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">_cachedSerializerMap</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">put</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cl</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">serializer</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">return</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">serializer</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="54-spi扩展serialization" class="heading-element"><span>5.4 SPI扩展Serialization</span>
 <a href="#54-spi%e6%89%a9%e5%b1%95serialization" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>这个方法理论上是完全可行的，但是有些过于大动干戈了。总体思路是：借助Dubbo的SPI机制，对Serialization进行扩展，基于hessian2的SerializerFactory ，对Serializer、Deserializer进行扩展。</p>
<h2 id="6-写在最后" class="heading-element"><span>6 写在最后</span>
 <a href="#6-%e5%86%99%e5%9c%a8%e6%9c%80%e5%90%8e" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>最开始计划用一两天的时间写完这篇博客，但是过程中又不断的遇到问题、解决问题，最终花了整个五一假期才完成。通过这个问题，算是对Dubbo框架的序列化这块有了一些了解了。</p>

item.title: GitHub Pages + Hugo搭建个人博客
item.description:
<h2 id="0-前言" class="heading-element"><span>0 前言</span>
 <a href="#0-%e5%89%8d%e8%a8%80" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>去年年底开始，就一直有写博客的想法，一方面来沉淀自己的技术，另一方面也希望能对他人有些小小的帮助。如今各种平台非常的多，但是不是广告铺天盖地，就是样式固定，不够个性化。最终决定借助Github Pages来搭建一个属于自己的个性化博客。</p>
<p><a href="https://pages.github.com/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">Github Pages</a> 是由GitHub提供的一个免费构建网站的方式。通过创建名为<code>github用户名.github.io</code>的仓库，上传文件后，就可以通过 <code>http://github用户名.github.io</code>访问你的网站。</p>
<p>GIthub Pages默认使用<a href="https://jekyllrb.com/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">Jekyll</a>构建静态网站，由于Jekyll依赖于Ruby，并且个人对Ruby完全不熟悉，所以最终选择了基于Golang的静态网站生成器<a href="https://gohugo.io/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">Hugo</a>来生成静态网站，然后托管在Github上。</p>
<h2 id="1-创建github仓库" class="heading-element"><span>1 创建github仓库</span>
 <a href="#1-%e5%88%9b%e5%bb%bagithub%e4%bb%93%e5%ba%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>创建一个 名为<code>github用户名.github.io</code>的仓库，<code>github用户名</code>填写自己的GIthub用户名。比如我，仓库名就是<code>dingyufan.github.io</code>。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/create-repository.png" alt="create-repository" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/create-repository.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/create-repository.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/create-repository.png?size=large 2x" data-title="create-repository" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>创建之后，是一个空仓库，先放着暂时不管。</p>
<h2 id="2-安装golang" class="heading-element"><span>2 安装Golang</span>
 <a href="#2-%e5%ae%89%e8%a3%85golang" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>Windows系统安装Golang非常简单，<a href="https://studygolang.com/dl"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">下载msi安装包</a>，直接安装即可。默认会安装到 <code>C:\Go</code> 目录下，同时<code>C:\Go\bin</code> 目录也会被添加到PATH 环境变量中。可以通过<code>go version</code>验证安装的版本。目前最新版本应该是go1.18，我是之前安装的老版本。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220410185748.png" alt="微信截图_20220410185748" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220410185748.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220410185748.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220410185748.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220410185748" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="3-安装hugo" class="heading-element"><span>3 安装hugo</span>
 <a href="#3-%e5%ae%89%e8%a3%85hugo" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>创建文件夹<code>C:\Hugo</code>、<code>C:\Hugo\bin</code>、<code>C:\Hugo\sites</code>。其中bin目录用来存放hugo可执行程序，sites目录则用来保存站点。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409125654.png" alt="微信截图_20220409125654" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409125654.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409125654.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409125654.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220409125654" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>从Github下载<a href="https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">Hugo发布的安装包</a>，注意要使用<strong>extended版本</strong>，我下载的就是 hugo_extended_0.96.0_Windows-64bit.zip</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409130146.png" alt="微信截图_20220409130146" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409130146.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409130146.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409130146.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220409130146" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>将下载的hugo解压，并把解压得到的内容放到 <code>C:\Hugo\bin</code>下。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409125710.png" alt="微信截图_20220409125710" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409125710.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409125710.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409125710.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220409125710" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>为了方便使用hugo.exe，我们把<code>C:\Hugo\bin</code>添加到环境变量PATH中。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410191852967.png" alt="image-20220410191852967" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410191852967.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410191852967.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410191852967.png?size=large 2x" data-title="image-20220410191852967" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="4-创建网站" class="heading-element"><span>4 创建网站</span>
 <a href="#4-%e5%88%9b%e5%bb%ba%e7%bd%91%e7%ab%99" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>准备完全后，就可以开始构建网站了。进入<code>C:\Hugo\sites</code>目录，使用<code>hugo new site 网站名</code>创建网站。</p>
<p>注意，为了方便关联Github仓库，建议网站名与Github仓库名一致，比如我站点名、Github仓库名都为 dingyufan.github.io。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409130406.png" alt="微信截图_20220409130406" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409130406.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409130406.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409130406.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220409130406" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="5-修改主题" class="heading-element"><span>5 修改主题</span>
 <a href="#5-%e4%bf%ae%e6%94%b9%e4%b8%bb%e9%a2%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>Hugo拥有非常丰富的主题，可以实现各种个性化需求。我这次选择的主题是 <a href="https://github.com/Lruihao/FixIt"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">FixIt</a>。</p>
<p>安装主题的方式有很多</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>一：可以直接下载主题，放置在站点的 themes文件夹下。需要注意的是，下载的主题要放在themes下和主题同名的文件夹内。比如FixIt，放置在<code>C:\Hugo\sites\dingyufan.github.io\themes\FixIt</code>中，文件夹不存在则自行创建；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>二：可以把主题克隆到 <code>themes</code> 目录。</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">cd</span> C:/Hugo/sites/dingyufan.github.io
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git clone https://github.com/Lruihao/FixIt.git themes/FixIt</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p><strong>三：初始化仓库，并将主题仓库作为你的网站目录的子模块</strong>。</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">cd</span> C:/Hugo/sites/dingyufan.github.io
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git init
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git submodule add https://github.com/Lruihao/FixIt.git themes/FixIt</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<p>注意：<strong>推荐使用第三种方式！推荐使用第三种方式！推荐使用第三种方式！</strong></p>
<p>否则之后Github Pages在构建时会有异常！<font color="red"><code>No url found for submodule path 'themes/FixIt' in .gitmodules</code></font></p>
<p>安装主题之后，如何选择使用该主题呢？修改站点下配置文件config.toml</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410195927557.png" alt="image-20220410195927557" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410195927557.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410195927557.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410195927557.png?size=large 2x" data-title="image-20220410195927557" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>修改其中的 theme 选项，同时可以根据<a href="https://fixit.lruihao.cn/zh-cn/theme-documentation-basics/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">FitIt主题说明</a>，设置更多个性化配置。</p>
<p>我的config.toml文件基础配置如下：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span><span class="lnt">34
</span><span class="lnt">35
</span><span class="lnt">36
</span><span class="lnt">37
</span><span class="lnt">38
</span><span class="lnt">39
</span><span class="lnt">40
</span><span class="lnt">41
</span><span class="lnt">42
</span><span class="lnt">43
</span><span class="lnt">44
</span><span class="lnt">45
</span><span class="lnt">46
</span><span class="lnt">47
</span><span class="lnt">48
</span><span class="lnt">49
</span><span class="lnt">50
</span><span class="lnt">51
</span><span class="lnt">52
</span><span class="lnt">53
</span><span class="lnt">54
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-toml" data-lang="toml"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">baseURL</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;http://dingyufan.github.io/&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c"># [en, zh-cn, fr, ...] 设置默认的语言</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">defaultContentLanguage</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;zh-cn&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c"># 网站语言，仅在这里 CN 大写</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">languageCode</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;zh-CN&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c"># 是否包括中日韩文字</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">hasCJKLanguage</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="kc">true</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c"># 网站标题</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">title</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;我的全新 Hugo 网站&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c"># 文章发布位置</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">publishDir</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;docs&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c"># 更改使用 Hugo 构建网站时使用的默认主题</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">theme</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;FixIt&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">[</span><span class="nx">params</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c"># FixIt 主题版本</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">version</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;0.2.X&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">[</span><span class="nx">menu</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">[[</span><span class="nx">menu</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">main</span><span class="p">]]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">identifier</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;posts&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c"># 你可以在名称（允许 HTML 格式）之前添加其他信息，例如图标</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">pre</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c"># 你可以在名称（允许 HTML 格式）之后添加其他信息，例如图标</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">post</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">name</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;文章&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">url</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;/posts/&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c"># 当你将鼠标悬停在此菜单链接上时，将显示的标题</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">title</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">weight</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">[[</span><span class="nx">menu</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">main</span><span class="p">]]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">identifier</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;categories&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">pre</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">post</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">name</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;分类&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">url</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;/categories/&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">title</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">weight</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="mi">2</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">[[</span><span class="nx">menu</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">main</span><span class="p">]]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">identifier</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;tags&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">pre</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">post</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">name</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;标签&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">url</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;/tags/&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">title</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">weight</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="mi">3</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c"># Hugo 解析文档的配置</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">[</span><span class="nx">markup</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c"># 语法高亮设置 (https://gohugo.io/content-management/syntax-highlighting)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">[</span><span class="nx">markup</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">highlight</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c"># false 是必要的设置 (https://github.com/Lruihao/FixIt/issues/43)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nx">noClasses</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="kc">false</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="6-写文章" class="heading-element"><span>6 写文章</span>
 <a href="#6-%e5%86%99%e6%96%87%e7%ab%a0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>创建文章。<code>hugo new posts/文件名.md</code>, 会在站点的 content/post路径下创建一个md文件。这就是要写的博文。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191339.png" alt="微信截图_20220409191339" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191339.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191339.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191339.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220409191339" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>注意，默认创建的md文件是草稿。草稿在构建网站时是会被忽略的。所以<strong>一定要在发布前，修改文件头中 draft为false</strong>。</p>
<p>在里面写一行 hello github pages</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191751.png" alt="微信截图_20220409191751" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191751.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191751.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191751.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220409191751" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>可以通过<code>hugo serve</code>命令启动本地预览，通过localhost:1313即可访问预览。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191826.png" alt="微信截图_20220409191826" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191826.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191826.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191826.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220409191826" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>看到预览效果</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191900.png" alt="微信截图_20220409191900" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191900.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191900.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191900.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220409191900" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="7-发布网站" class="heading-element"><span>7 发布网站</span>
 <a href="#7-%e5%8f%91%e5%b8%83%e7%bd%91%e7%ab%99" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>Hugo默认会把构建后的网站放在 public 文件夹下，但是为了方用github统一管理 发布前、后的内容，我想要将构建后网站路径，修改为放在docs文件夹下。</p>
<p>可以通过<code>-d docs</code>指定构建后放在docs文件夹下。<strong>也可以在config.toml中添加一行配置<code>publishDir = &quot;docs&quot;</code>，这样就不需要在构建时使用 -d ，直接执行 <code>hugo</code>就可以完成侯建并放入docs文件夹。</strong></p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191950.png" alt="微信截图_20220409191950" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191950.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191950.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/%E5%BE%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%88%AA%E5%9B%BE_20220409191950.png?size=large 2x" data-title="微信截图_20220409191950" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>构建网站之后，需要将网站托管到Github上，即 上传到刚开始创建的空仓库里。</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git init
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git add -A
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git commit -m <span class="s1">&#39;init&#39;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git branch -M main
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git remote add origin git@githubcom:dingyufan/dingyufan.github.io.git
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git push -u origin main</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="8-github-pages配置" class="heading-element"><span>8 Github Pages配置</span>
 <a href="#8-github-pages%e9%85%8d%e7%bd%ae" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>提交代码之后，需要修改Github Pages配置。指定Github Pages发布docs文件夹下的内容。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410202202488.png" alt="image-20220410202202488" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410202202488.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410202202488.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410202202488.png?size=large 2x" data-title="image-20220410202202488" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>这样，仓库里的内容就是hugo生成的site的全部内容，docs文件夹下则是构建后的静态页面。这样可以对这个site完整的进行版本控制。</p>
<h2 id="9-绑定域名" class="heading-element"><span>9 绑定域名</span>
 <a href="#9-%e7%bb%91%e5%ae%9a%e5%9f%9f%e5%90%8d" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>在完成以上步骤后，已经可以通过 <code>http://dingyufan.github.io</code>访问到网站了。</p>
<p>Github Pages还支持自定义域名。我希望通能过自己的域名 <code>http://blog.dingyufan.cn</code> 访问</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410202804130.png" alt="image-20220410202804130" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410202804130.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410202804130.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410202804130.png?size=large 2x" data-title="image-20220410202804130" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>配置后，要在域名注册商那里修改 域名解析规则。添加CNAME记录类型。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410203010269.png" alt="image-20220410203010269" srcset="https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410203010269.png?size=small, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410203010269.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://dingyufan-github-io.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/image-20220410203010269.png?size=large 2x" data-title="image-20220410203010269" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>待解析生效之后，即可通过自定义域名访问。</p>
